products.name: Eternal Bloom Resin Frame
products.description: Preserve your cherished wedding flowers in a stunning crystal-clear resin frame. A timeless keepsake to remember your special day.

products.name: Enchanted Garden Resin Coasters
products.description: A set of four exquisite coasters with delicate flowers preserved in high-gloss resin. Perfect for adding a touch of nature to your home.

products.name: Couple's Hand Casting Kit
products.description: Create a beautiful, detailed sculpture of you and your partner's hands. Our easy-to-use kit comes with everything you need.

products.name: Baby's First Handprint Kit
products.description: Capture the precious memory of your baby's tiny hands or feet in a beautiful resin plaque. A perfect gift for new parents.

products.name: Oceanic Waves Resin Wall Art
products.description: A breathtaking piece of wall art that captures the movement of ocean waves. Made with multiple layers of colored resin.

products.name: Galaxy Resin Geode Art
products.description: A mesmerizing geode-inspired art piece with real crystals and shimmering pigments that mimics a slice of the galaxy.

products.name: Floral Resin Jewelry Box
products.description: A beautiful jewelry box with a lid adorned with preserved flowers in crystal clear resin. A perfect gift for her.

products.name: Abstract Ink Drop Resin Clock
products.description: A stylish and modern wall clock featuring a unique abstract design created with alcohol inks suspended in resin.
